name: OC Policy Enforcement
description: Checks every tool call against the OC Policy Server before execution. Returns allow/deny/pending verdicts with optional human approval polling.

policyServerUrl.description: URL of the OC Policy Server (e.g. https://lew-mac-2023.tail9284d9.ts.net)

agentToken.description: Agent API token for the policy server (read-only — can only call /check and /approvals)

approvalTimeoutMs.description: How long to poll for human approval before timing out (default: 120000 ms)

channelId.description: Channel ID for identity resolution (e.g. tg:6741893378). Null uses token-based identity.
